get.description: List the operations for the provider
List ComputeConfig resources by subscription ID
List ContainerImage resources by subscription ID
List Project resources by subscription ID
List Job resources by subscription ID
List Service resources by subscription ID
List Workspace resources by subscription ID
List cloud resources by resource group

put.description: Create or update a cloud resource

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The resource properties to be updated.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

CloudListResult.description: The response of a Cloud list operation.

value.description: The Cloud items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

acrResourceId.description: Optional ACR resource ID for image builds. Format: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/{acrName}

ssoUrl.description: The SSO URL for the cloud

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the cloud resource

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

CloudResourceListResult.description: The response of a CloudResource list operation.

value.description: The CloudResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

cloudResourceId.description:
The cloud resource ID which is used during Anyscale operator bootstrap,
generated by Anyscale control plane.

computeStack.description: Compute stack of the cloud resource

cloudStorageBucketName.description:
A fully qualified storage bucket name for cloud storage,
e.g. s3://bucket-name, gs://bucket-name, or
abfss://bucket-name

anyscaleOperatorIamIdentity.description: The principal ID of the managed identity that will be used by the Anyscale operator

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the cloud resource

CloudResourceUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the CloudResource.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

CloudResourceUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the CloudResource.

computeStack.description: Compute stack of the cloud resource

cloudStorageBucketName.description:
A fully qualified storage bucket name for cloud storage,
e.g. s3://bucket-name, gs://bucket-name, or
abfss://bucket-name

anyscaleOperatorIamIdentity.description: The principal ID of the managed identity that will be used by the Anyscale operator

CloudUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the Cloud.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

CloudUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the Cloud.

acrResourceId.description: Optional ACR resource ID for image builds. Format: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/{acrName}

ComputeConfig.description: Concrete proxy resource types can be created by aliasing this type using a specific property type.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ComputeConfigListResult.description: The response of a ComputeConfig list operation.

value.description: The ComputeConfig items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

url.description: The URL to the compute config overview page in the Anyscale console.

revision.description: The current revision number. This is incremented when the compute config is updated.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the compute config.

options.description: A list of the compute config options.

cloudResourceNames.description: The name of the corresponding cloud resource to use for this compute config under the Anyscale cloud to launch the cluster. If not specified, all cloud resources will be used.

headNode.description: The node type to use for the head node.

workerNodes.description: The node types to use for the worker nodes.

zones.description: The availability zones that sessions are allowed to be launched in, e.g. "eastus-1". If not specified or "any" is provided as the option, any AZ may be used. If "any" is provided, it must be the only item in the list.

advancedInstanceConfig.description: Advanced configurations for this deployment compute config to pass to the cloud provider when launching this instance.

flags.description: A set of advanced cluster-level flags that can be used to configure a particular workload.

ComputeConfigSpecOrReference.description: An inline compute config spec or a predefined compute config which is used in the workload.

computeConfigName.description: The reference to the resource name of existing predefined compute config.

ComputeConfigUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the ComputeConfig.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ComputeConfigUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the ComputeConfig.

ComputeStack.description: Compute stack associated with the cloud resource

ContainerImage.description: Concrete proxy resource types can be created by aliasing this type using a specific property type.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ContainerImageBuildState.description: State of a container image build.

values.name: BuildPending
values.description: Build is queued; has not started yet.

values.name: BuildFailed
values.description: Build has completed with a failure.

ContainerImageListResult.description: The response of a ContainerImage list operation.

value.description: The ContainerImage items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ContainerImageProperties.description: Properties of a container image. Exactly one of `containerfile` or `containerImageUri` must be provided.

containerfile.description: Containerfile content to use to build the container image. Mutually exclusive with containerImageUri.

containerImageUri.description: The URI of a pre-built container image from an external registry. Mutually exclusive with containerfile.

url.description: The URL link of the container image to the Anyscale console.

revision.description: The current revision number. This is incremented when the container image is updated.

buildState.description: The current state of the container image build.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the container image.

ContainerImageUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the ContainerImage.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ContainerImageUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the ContainerImage.

containerfile.description: Containerfile content to use to build the container image. Mutually exclusive with containerImageUri.

containerImageUri.description: The URI of a pre-built container image from an external registry. Mutually exclusive with containerfile.

Job.description: Concrete proxy resource types can be created by aliasing this type using a specific property type.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

imageUri.description: The URI of the Ray image to use for the job.

computeConfig.description: The compute configuration for the job, either the name of predefined compute config or an inline compute configs object.

entrypoint.description: Command that will be run to execute the job, e.g. 'python main.py'.

workingDir.description: The working directory that your code will run in. Must be a remote URI like an Azure blob object or git path.

pyModules.description: Python modules that will be installed along with your runtime env. These must be remote URIs.

pipRequirements.description: A list of pip requirements to install on top of the image.

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of times the job will be retried before being marked failed.

timeout.description: The timeout in seconds for each job run.

JobListResult.description: The response of a Job list operation.

value.description: The Job items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

state.description: The current state of the job.

url.description: The URL to the job overview page in the Anyscale console.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the job.

JobState.description: The current state of a job.

values.name: Starting
values.description: The job is being started and is not yet running.

values.name: Failed
values.description: The job did not finish running or the entrypoint returned a non-zero exit code after retrying up to max_retries times.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The job finished running and its entrypoint returned exit code 0.

JobUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the Job.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

JobUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the Job.

LogicalResources.description: Logical resources for a node type used during Ray scheduling.

cpu.description: Number of CPUs in this node type.

gpu.description: Number of GPUs in this node type.

memory.description: Amount of memory to allocate to the Python worker.

objectStoreMemory.description: The amount of memory in bytes allocated for the Ray object store on this node.

customResources.description: Custom resources for this node to be used by Ray autoscaler.

MarketType.description: Market type of instances to use (on-demand vs spot).

values.name: PREFER_SPOT
values.description: Prefer to use spot instances but fall back to on-demand if necessary.

name.description: Unique name of this node group.

instanceType.description: The cloud provider instance type to use for this node. Optional when using requiredResources.

resources.description: Declaration of logical node resources for Ray.

requiredResources.description: Required resources for compute node type which specifies the actual CPU, memory, and GPU resources that should be allocated for this node type.

labels.description: Labels to associate the node with for Ray scheduling purposes.

requiredLabels.description: Required labels that must be present on the node for node (pod) scheduling purposes.

advancedInstanceConfig.description: Advanced configurations for this compute node type to pass to the cloud provider when launching this instance.

flags.description: A set of advanced node-level flags that can be used to configure a particular workload.

PhysicalResources.description: Physical resources for the underlying node type.

memory.description: Amount of memory in bytes to allocate.

Project.description: Concrete proxy resource types can be created by aliasing this type using a specific property type.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ProjectListResult.description: The response of a Project list operation.

value.description: The Project items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

url.description: The URL link of the project to the Anyscale console.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the project.

Provider.description: Cloud provider for the cloud resources

RayGcsExternalStorageConfig.description: External storage configuration for Ray GCS fault tolerance.

address.description: Address of the external storage (e.g., Redis). Must be accessible from instances in the cloud.

certificatePath.description: Path to the TLS certificate file to use for authentication when using secure connections. Defaults to the cloud-wide configuration.

RolloutStrategy.description: The deployment rollout strategy for a service.

values.name: Rollout
values.description: Deploy to a new cluster and gradually shift traffic via canary deployment.

values.name: InPlace
values.description: Update the existing cluster in-place via Ray Serve. Only ray_serve_config changes are allowed.

values.name: MultiVersion
values.description: Deploy multiple versions simultaneously with explicit traffic allocation.

Service.description: An Anyscale service that serves Ray Serve applications.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ServiceCurrentState.description: The current running state of a service.

values.name: Running
values.description: The service is healthy and running.

values.name: Unhealthy
values.description: The service has errors but is still running.

values.name: RollingOut
values.description: The service is in the process of rolling out a new version.

values.name: RollingBack
values.description: The service is rolling back to a previous version.

ServiceDeploymentConfig.description: Configurable deployment properties for a service. These fields are user-writable on create and update.

computeConfig.description: The compute config to use for the service.

imageUri.description: The URI of the container image to use for the service.

applications.description: List of Ray Serve applications to run. At least one application must be specified. Each application must include an 'importPath'. See https://docs.ray.io/en/latest/serve/production-guide/config.html for the Ray Serve config format.

rolloutStrategy.description: The deployment rollout strategy. Defaults to Rollout.

version.description: The version identifier for this deployment. Auto-generated if not provided.

canaryPercent.description: The percentage of traffic to route to the canary version during rollout (0-100). If not set, the service will automatically roll out.

maxSurgePercent.description: The maximum percentage of excess capacity allowed during rollout (0-100).

autoCompleteRollout.description: Whether to automatically complete the rollout when the canary version reaches 100% traffic. Defaults to true.

trafficPercent.description: The traffic percentage for this version in a multi-version deployment (0-100). All version weights must sum to 100.

maxUptimeTimeoutSec.description: Auto-termination timeout in seconds. The service will be unconditionally terminated after this period. Setting to 0 disables auto-termination (default).

envVars.description: Environment variables to set on the service cluster.

rayGcsExternalStorageConfig.description: External storage configuration for Ray GCS head node fault tolerance. If populated, head node fault tolerance will be enabled.

connectionIds.description: List of connection IDs to associate with the service for third-party integrations.

ServiceListResult.description: The response of a Service list operation.

value.description: The Service items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ServiceProperties.description: The properties of the Anyscale service.

deploymentConfig.description: Deployment config of the Anyscale service.

currentState.description: The current running state of the service.

hostname.description: The hostname of the service endpoint.

baseUrl.description: The base URL of the service endpoint.

autoRolloutEnabled.description: Whether the service has auto-rollout enabled.

primaryVersion.description: The primary (stable) version of the service. If the service is terminated, this refers to the most recently active version.

canaryVersion.description: The canary version of the service. Present only during a rolling out state.

url.description: The URL link to the service in the Anyscale console.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the Anyscale service.

ServiceUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the Service.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ServiceUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the Service.

deploymentConfig.description: Deployment config of the Anyscale service.

ServiceVersionDetail.description: Inline summary of a service version, returned as part of the service response.

weight.description: The target percentage of traffic sent to this version (0-100).

currentWeight.description: The current percentage of traffic sent to this version (0-100).

currentState.description: The current state of this version.

imageUri.description: The URI of the container image used by this version.

computeConfig.description: The ID of the compute configuration used by this version.

applications.description: List of Ray Serve applications for this version.

rayGcsExternalStorageConfig.description: External storage configuration for Ray GCS head node fault tolerance. If populated, head node fault tolerance will be enabled.

createdAt.description: The time this version was created.

ServiceVersionState.description: The state of an individual service version.

enabled.description: Whether tracing is enabled. If enabled and no exporterImportPath is defined, the default tracing exporter will be used. Defaults to true.

exporterImportPath.description: Custom tracing exporter import path. Should be of the form 'module.submodule.export_tracing'.

samplingRatio.description: The sampling ratio for tracing (0.0 to 1.0). Reducing the ratio minimizes serving latency and storage overhead. Defaults to 1.0.

WorkerNode.description: Configuration for a worker node group.

minNodes.description: Minimum number of nodes of this type that will be kept running in the cluster.

maxNodes.description: Maximum number of nodes of this type that can be running in the cluster.

values.name: PREFER_SPOT
values.description: Prefer to use spot instances but fall back to on-demand if necessary.

Workspace.description: Concrete proxy resource types can be created by aliasing this type using a specific property type.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

WorkspaceListResult.description: The response of a Workspace list operation.

value.description: The Workspace items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

computeConfig.description: The compute config to use for the workspace.

imageUri.description: The URI of the Ray image to use for the workspace.

idleTerminationMinutes.description: If set to a positive number, Anyscale will terminate the workspace this many minutes after the workspace is idle. Idle time is defined as the time during which a workspace is not running a user command. To disable, set this field to 0.

currentStatus.description: The current status of the workspace.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the workspace.

values.name: Errored
values.description: The workspace is in an error state.

WorkspaceUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the Workspace.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

WorkspaceUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the Workspace.

computeConfig.description: The compute config to use for the workspace.

imageUri.description: The URI of the Ray image to use for the workspace.

idleTerminationMinutes.description: If set to a positive number, Anyscale will terminate the workspace this many minutes after the workspace is idle. Idle time is defined as the time during which a workspace is not running a user command. To disable, set this field to 0.
